LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal.stages.0.description: A transcendent encounter with flavor. Every delicate note of the meal unfolds like a masterpiece, elevating my senses to realms of pure culinary artistry.
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal.stages.0.label: ate haute meal
